privilege_notes: runs fetched package code at launch

findings.title: Installed on-the-fly via a package runner
findings.detail: Server 'idea-reality' is fetched and executed at launch via 'uvx'; package spec: idea-reality-mcp.
findings.recommendation: Install the server as a pinned dependency and invoke the local binary, or vendor it. If a runner is unavoidable, pin an exact version (see unpinned_source).

findings.title: Package source is unpinned or mutable
findings.detail: Server 'idea-reality' package spec 'idea-reality-mcp' is unpinned (pin strength: none): no version specified (resolves to whatever the registry serves now).
findings.recommendation: Pin an exact version (pkg@1.2.3) or a git commit SHA. Avoid @latest and branch refs.

evidence.reason: no version specified (resolves to whatever the registry serves now)

findings.title: Server requires sensitive credentials
findings.detail: Server 'idea-reality' requires credential-like env keys: GITHUB_TOKEN, PRODUCTHUNT_TOKEN.
findings.recommendation: Confirm each credential is scoped to least privilege and rotatable. Note which tools can exfiltrate it.

tools.name: idea_check
tools.description:
Check if a product idea already exists before building it.

Use when users discuss new project ideas, ask about competition,
market saturation, or whether something has been built before.

Trigger phrases: "has anyone built", "does this exist",
"check competition", "is this idea original",
"有沒有人做過", "市場上有類似的嗎", "幫我查這個點子"

data_categories.label: Project / task / status metadata

evidence.snippet:
.

Use when users discuss new project ideas, ask about competition,

data_categories.rationale: Names, statuses, and structure of work — identifying but not the underlying content.
data_categories.validation_reason: The word 'project' in 'new project ideas' refers to proposed product concepts, not project management metadata (tickets, boards, milestones, sprints); the skill checks market saturation and idea novelty with no integration to project management systems or structured project data.

validated_out.reason: The word 'project' in 'new project ideas' refers to proposed product concepts, not project management metadata (tickets, boards, milestones, sprints); the skill checks market saturation and idea novelty with no integration to project management systems or structured project data.
